title: selaginella sechellarum
intro: Selaginella sechellarum, also known as the Seychelles spike moss or Seychelles resurrection plant, is a species of fern ally that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to the Seychelles islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as wound healing and protection against infection. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often employed in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. Furthermore, research suggests that Selaginella sechellarum may possess antioxidant and anti-cancer properties, making it a promising area of study for its potential health benefits.
